user.title: Axium Amplifier
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Axium amplifier. Commands are sent over Ethernet to TCP port 17037.

data_description.zones: Comma-separated list of zone numbers to control (e.g. 1,2,3,4).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the amplifier. Check the host and port.
error.invalid_zones: Enter a comma-separated list of zone numbers between 0 and 95.

init.title: Axium Amplifier
init.description: Update the list of controlled zones.

data_description.zones: Comma-separated list of zone numbers to control (e.g. 1,2,3,4).

error.invalid_zones: Enter a comma-separated list of zone numbers between 0 and 95.
